## Extract antibody measurement values {.unnumbered}


### Description

Extract antibody measurement values



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>get_values_var(object, ...)
</code></pre>


### Arguments

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="object">object</code></td>
<td>
a <code>pop_data</code> object
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="...">...</code></td>
<td>
unused
</td></tr>
</table>


### Value

the name of the column in <code>object</code> specified as containing
antibody abundance measurements



### Examples
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
library("serocalculator")

sees_pop_data_100 |> get_values_var()


```
